message:
fix(analysis): adapt drift comparison to actual item count when under five

Replace hardcoded top-5 comparison with min(baseline_len, current_len, 5)
so that metrics with fewer than five items are compared correctly instead
of silently undercounting drift. Alert messages now report the actual
compared count (e.g. "2 of top-3 rankings changed" instead of "top-5").

Early-return when compare_count is zero to avoid division-by-zero in
downstream percentage calculations.

New test: check_metric_drift_reports_actual_compared_count_when_under_five.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
